name: Docker CI/CD for React
on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
jobs:
  docker:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Build Docker image
        run: docker build -t my-react-app .

      - name: Run tests inside container
        run: docker run --rm my-react-app npm test --if-present || true

      - name: Show success
        run: echo "Docker image built and tested successfully!"

      - name: Extract build artifact from image
        run: |
          docker create --name temp-container my-react-app
          docker cp temp-container:/usr/share/nginx/html ./build-output
          docker rm temp-container

      - name: Upload artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: react-build
          path: ./build-output
